auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
auth.resetPasswordEmailSent: Reset link sent! Check your email for instructions.
auth.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm your account.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.noTransactionsDescription: Transactions extracted from your emails will appear here
transactions.selectTransaction: Select a transaction to view its details
transactions.deleteConfirmation: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.noAccountsDescription: You won't receive new transactions automatically. Connect a Gmail account in settings to start receiving notifications.

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your document here
upload.supportedFormats: Supports PDF and image files (JPG, PNG, etc.)

errors.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload PDF or image files.
errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is {{size}}MB.

metrics.title: Financial Metrics
metrics.description: Detailed analysis of your transactions and financial trends
metrics.needMoreMonths: Need at least 2 months of data to show trends
metrics.selectSpecificCurrency: Please select a specific currency to view accurate metrics

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Possible recurring payments detected automatically from your transactions.
subscriptions.emptyDescription: Detected recurring charges with enough confidence will appear here.
subscriptions.filteredEmptyDescription: Try changing or clearing filters to see more subscriptions.

gracePeriod.title: In grace period
gracePeriod.description_one: The estimated date already passed. {{days}} day left before it becomes inactive ({{total}}-day grace).
gracePeriod.description_other: The estimated date already passed. {{days}} days left before it becomes inactive ({{total}}-day grace).

settings.title: Settings
settings.emailConfiguredSuccess: Email configured successfully! You will now receive notifications from your emails.
settings.emailConfigError: Error configuring email. Please try again.
settings.userIdError: Error: Could not get user ID.
settings.gmailConnectError: Error connecting Gmail. Please try again.
settings.confirmDisconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect your Gmail account?
settings.gmailDisconnectError: Error disconnecting Gmail. Please try again.
settings.notificationsDescription: You will receive automatic notifications when new emails arrive in your inbox.
settings.reconnectHint: Your Gmail session expired. Reconnect this account to continue receiving transactions.
settings.connectDescription: Connect your Gmail account to receive automatic notifications when new emails arrive in your inbox. You can connect multiple accounts.
settings.gmailPrivacyNote: When connecting your Gmail, you will be asked for permission to read your emails. We will only use this information to process financial transactions and notify you of relevant new emails.
settings.confirmDisconnectEmail: Are you sure you want to disconnect the account {{email}}?
settings.seedEmailsDescription: You just connected your Gmail account. Would you like us to analyze your emails from the last 3 months to automatically find invoices and transactions?
settings.seedFeature1Description: We'll review all your emails looking for invoices and receipts
settings.seedFeature2Description: We'll import transactions from 3 months ago to today
settings.seedNoteDescription: The process may take several minutes depending on the number of emails. You can close this window and we'll notify you when it's done.
settings.seedStartedSuccess: Import started. We'll notify you when it's done.
settings.seedStartError: Error starting import. Please try again.
settings.seedAlreadyInProgress: There is already an import in progress for this account. Please wait for it to finish.
settings.seedCompletedAllProcessed: {{count}} emails were reviewed but all had already been processed.
settings.seedCompletedNoTransactionsDescription: {{count}} emails were analyzed but no new transactions were found.
settings.seedCompletedDescription: Check your transactions to see the new movements.
settings.seedFailedDescription: There was an error processing the emails. Please try again.
settings.disconnectedAccountsDescription: These accounts have no active token, but are kept to preserve history and allow reconnection.
settings.gmailReconnectWarning: We detected one or more accounts with an invalid token or webhook subscription. Try reconnecting the account to restore synchronization.
settings.gmailMissingWatchWarning: {{count}} connected account(s) currently have no active Gmail watch.

settings.title: Notification preferences
settings.description: Choose which system notifications you want to receive.

seed_completed_with_transactions.label: Import completed with new transactions
seed_completed_with_transactions.description: Notifies when a seed/import process ends and new transactions are found.

seed_completed_no_new.label: Import completed without changes
seed_completed_no_new.description: Notifies when import ends but there are no new transactions.

gmail_reconnect_required.label: Gmail reconnect required
gmail_reconnect_required.description: Notifies when Gmail credentials expire and require reconnect.

gmail_watch_expiring.label: Gmail watch expiring
gmail_watch_expiring.description: Notifies when Gmail webhook watch is close to expiration.

gmail_watch_renew_failed.label: Gmail watch renewal failed
gmail_watch_renew_failed.description: Notifies when automatic watch renewal fails.

gmail_sync_error.label: Gmail sync error
gmail_sync_error.description: Notifies when synchronization with Gmail fails.

seed_completed_with_transactions.title: Import completed
seed_completed_with_transactions.body: {{count}} new transaction(s) were found while processing {{totalEmails}} emails.

seed_completed_no_new.title: Import completed
seed_completed_no_new.body: No new transactions were found after processing {{totalEmails}} emails.

seed_failed.title: Import failed
seed_failed.body: We couldn't process your emails. Reason: {{reason}}.

gmail_reconnect_required.title: Reconnect your Gmail account
gmail_reconnect_required.body: The account {{email}} requires reconnection to continue syncing.

gmail_watch_expiring.title: Gmail subscription expiring soon
gmail_watch_expiring.body: The subscription for {{email}} is close to expiration.

dashboardActionFirst.headerDescription: Quick action panel to keep your finances and automations up to date.

addTransaction.title: Add transaction
addTransaction.description: Create a manual transaction in a few steps.

connectGmail.title: Connect Gmail
connectGmail.description: Link or recover accounts for automatic imports.

forceSync.title: Force sync
forceSync.description: Run an immediate historical email import.

openTransactions.title: Open transactions
openTransactions.description: Review and fix pending movements quickly.

smartTasks.title: Smart tasks
smartTasks.empty: All set. No pending tasks right now.

reviewFallback.title: Low-confidence transactions detected
reviewFallback.description: {{count}} movements with zero amount or incomplete data need manual review.

reviewUncategorized.title: Pending categorization
reviewUncategorized.description: You have {{count}} transactions without final category.

reconnectGmail.title: Gmail connections to reconnect
reconnectGmail.description: {{count}} account(s) need reconnection to keep importing.

renewWatch.title: Notifications expiring soon
renewWatch.description: {{count}} Gmail watch subscription(s) will expire soon.

seedFailed.title: Last synchronization failed
seedFailed.description: There was an error importing emails.

keywords.metrics: metrics statistics analysis charts reports finances

errors.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
